summary: Live PR inventory shard only. No shared canonical was selected. Deterministic validation identified the five seed PRs as security-sensitive for routing, so each exact PR ref is quarantined with route_security. Linked non-security issues remain open and related to their hydrated open PR candidates; no close, fix, merge, comment, or label mutation is planned by this repaired result.
